creator: alexbestms@wwu.de
text:
you might want to mail delphij@FreeBSD.org and see what he thinks about it.
he's been doing most of the latest WITHOUT_* changes.

alex

Rob Farmer schrieb am 2010-02-10:
> On Tue, Feb 9, 2010 at 5:04 AM, Alexander Best <alexbestms@wwu.de>
> wrote:
> > could you try again with a fresh HEAD snapshot? i think this got
> > fixed by
> > delphij@ in r203584.

> > cheers.
> > alex


> Looks good, except that I think /usr/sbin/sendmail should be added to
> the MAILWRAPPER sections, since it is a symlink to
> /usr/sbin/mailwrapper.
